use.flag: Install the GTK4/libadwaita configuration and enrollment application
Install the opt-in sequential PAM service for Hyprlock

pkgmetadata.longdescription: Gaze provides an on-device face-recognition daemon, command-line and graphical clients, liveness detection, TPM-backed template encryption, and a sequential PAM module. The simultaneous grosshack PAM module is intentionally not built or installed by this package.
